title: Signal Duel Official Rules

startingInventory.extraDuplicate: one private rock, paper, or scissors per player

turnOrder.commit: starter commits hidden move, then responder commits hidden move

publicStateBoundary: Agents see their own remaining inventory.
Agents see both players' played moves after reveal.
Agents see dialogue, scores, valid own moves, and round history.
Opponent current committed moves, opponent remaining inventory, private extra tokens, calculated possible remaining moves, recommendations, and strategy advice are not exposed.

terminalOutcome.draw: equal score after 3 rounds, refund path
